titleStmt.title: SII 8.377: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 377. (A.R. No. 92 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīman mahārābhādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapradāpa śrīvīrasadāśivadevamahā
rā yar prathuvirājya m paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa sakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 9- nmel cel lāniṉṟa pilavaṅka
samvatsara ttu makaranā yiṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu pavaṇṇayaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūśa
ttu nāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrnāṭṭut tirukkāḷattiāṉa mummuṭico
ḻapurattu ṉāyaṉār tirukkāḷattiuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟku śrībha ṉam ceyvārkaḷom kuṉṟavattaṉakkoṭṭattu
vaṭṭiūrnāṭṭu nārāyaṇapurattuk kaṇakkappiḷḷai para me[ śvara maṅ] kalamuṭaiyār teyivaṅkaḷperumāḷ pu tra r nayiṉāṟku
dharmmaśāsana m paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tām ṉāyaṉār tevarkaḷcoḻaviṭaṅkar Eṭṭān tiruṉāḷil Amutuceytaruḷum tocai
ppaṭi 1- kkup poliūṭṭākat tirukkoyilil Oṭukkiṉa �100 Inda ppaṇam nūṟum ṉāyaṉār tevatānagrā maṅkaḷil Eriyiliṭṭuk kuḻi ve
ṭṭivittu nilam tirutti Anu mutal koṇṭu varuṣam 1- kku mātatiruṉāḷ patimūṉ m mārkaḻimāta(tai)t tiruvātiraiṉāḷ Uḷpaṭa Inda p patiṉālu nāḷilum
ṉāyaṉār tevarkaḷ cotiviṭaṅkar tiruccāntu cātti tiruvitikku Eḻuntaruḷi tiruccāntu kaṟpūraveḷḷai cāttit tiruvulāppuṟam ceytu ṉāyaṉār tiru
(tiru)kkāḷattiuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār saṉṉatiyil nāyaṟukāṇiyil tirukkaṇ Amutuceyitaruḷum tocaippaṭi 1- kku viṭum śrīpaṇṭārak
kālāl Amutupaṭi kaṭalai Uḻuntu 3 10 2 ney n=ta ḷu yimmaricātikki varuṣattukku lu nāḷum caippaṭi santānaparamparai
candrāditya varai tappāmal Amutuceyivittuvarakkaṭavomākavum . dharmmakar ttā ṉāliloṉṟukku varum tocai patimūṉṟum caiva
ccakkiṟavaṟtikaḷ Ayyapiḷḷaimutaliyār kuppayar putra r tevaṇarkurukkaḷ sandā ṉaparamparai candrāditya varai peṟṟukkoḷḷakkaṭavā
rā kavum . Ivai panmā heśvara rakṣai . .
Digital edition of SII 8.377 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
